description: Product Description Set of three canisters and 3 scoops with an elegant and functional design. At Storela, we believe an organised kitchen makes a happy home. Our Sleek black stainless steel canister set of 3 with a bonus of 3 scoops is designed to simplify your routine. Durable, airtight & stylish. Ideal for tea, coffee, sugar & versatile enough for other pantry staples KITCHEN CANISTERS For any home cook or coffee lover a well-organized and visually appealing kitchen is a must. That's why we offer versatile 3-pack canister set that's both practical and stylish. Crafted from durable materials, our canisters ensure longevity and safety. They're easy to clean &compact for saving space Introducing Storela 3 Pieces Kitchen Canister Set with 3 Individual Scoops. Each of the 17x11cm canister provides ample storage without being burdensome when filled. Airtight lids keep contents fresh, preserving flavour and aroma. There are 3x measuring 1 tbsp scoops, perfect for precise measuring and dispensing of your favourite ingredients. 1 2 3 4 5 6 PERFECT FOR BOTH HOME AND CAMPING AIR TIGHT AND SECURE LIDS The canisters' tight seal will keeps contents fresh longer, whether it's tea, sugar, coffee, herbs, or spices. MODERN DESIGN Stylish polished lids with modern colour-matched design elevate your kitchen's modern or contemporary design. TRANSPARENT WINDOWS Transparent windows will enable easy content identification, simplifying restocking and preventing last-minute surprises before your morning brew. STURDY DESIGN The canisters have sturdy bases, ensuring safe placement on shelves or kitchen surfaces, keeping your kitchen neat and organised. How do I properly use the stainless steel canisters? To properly use the stainless steel canister, first ensure they are clean & dry. Then fill them with desired ingredients, making sure not to overfill. Store in cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Make sure to close the lid securely after use. What are the best practices for cleaning the stainless steel canisters? Use warm, soapy water & a soft sponge or cloth to wash, avoid using abrasive or scouring pads as they can scratch the surface. Rinse thoroughly with clean water and dry it with soft towel or kitchen rolls. Ensure its dry before use. Can the stainless steel canisters be used to store both dry and liquid ingredients? Yes, it can be used to store both ingredients. The non-reactive nature of stainless steel make it suitable for storing wide range of items. However clean it properly after storing liquid ingredients to prevent residual moisture. Are the stainless steel canisters dishwasher safe? Certainly, however to ensure longevity and maintain the quality of the canisters, it's recommended to not wash it very often in dishwasher. Hand washing with warm, soapy water is a gentler option that can help preserve the appearance of the canisters
